title: Performance defaults pass + clamp audit
predecessor: M35-T0 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit da4ce1f — plan doc). M34 COMPLETE shipped 2026-04-18 (commits f1180cf + 893f8fd + af643ec). 1130 unit tests / 10 E2E spec files / 11 Playwright cases green. M34 and M33 folded into orchestrator history; M33 follow-ups F3 + F4 CLOSED in commit 039020b.
goal: Evidence-based measurement pass across the 10 Phase 5 settings clamps (rag_chunk_size / rag_chunk_overlap / rag_similarity_threshold / agentic_max_steps / agentic_max_tokens / agentic_timeout_ms / planner_max_tickets / planner_max_depth / planner_escalation_threshold / copilot_interval_minutes). Seed Strategia-X demo company with realistic content (50 tickets / 10 projects / 2 goals / 5 vault files) and run one full copilot analyzer tick against (a) local Ollama + llama3.1:8b if available AND (b) the canned test-copilot-provider seam. Record wall-clock per clamp. Move defaults ONLY if measurement justifies it. Every change lands with a one-line comment in apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts citing the measurement wall-clock (e.g., `// agentic_max_steps=12 — bumped from 8 after llama3.1:8b measured 11 steps avg on the Strategia-X seed (2026-04-19, M35 T1)`).
acceptance: M35 plan doc §4.2 settings-clamp table defaults either (a) remain unchanged with rationale in the commit body, OR (b) update with one-line justifying-measurement comment in apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts.
1. settings seed defaults match the final (possibly updated) values.
2. Clamp ranges unchanged — the clamp envelope is not moved by this task (only the default within the envelope).
3. copilot_interval_minutes restart-on-change behavior still fires the analyzer.restart(companyId) side effect.
4. Any revised default passes both the lower-clamp and upper-clamp assertions.
Zero new production files. All edits are to seed.ts + 2 test files.
pnpm test green (1130 → 1134). pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm lint 0 errors / ≤24 warnings.
Atomic commit: perf(m35): M35 T1 — performance defaults + clamp audit.

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M35 T1 — commit ledger (<sha>) — roll orchestrator.json tasksCompleted 1 → 2, update pending.json T1 status pending → shipped, update current-task.json to point at M35-T2, prepend M35 T1 DONE subsection to .loki/CONTINUITY.md.
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts (measurement-justified default changes + one-line comment per change)
apps/desktop/src/main/services/copilot-analyzer-service.ts (comment additions only if any default changes affect cadence)
packages/intelligence/src/rag/indexer.ts (comment additions only if chunk defaults change)
carryForward: M34 architectural seams (three-tier canned test seam QUARTET, pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, AbortController stop, is_system + filter-sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, atomic + ledger commit cadence, ABI rebuild dance, IPC-mutation-emits-bus-event invariant #11) all carry forward unchanged.
M33 follow-ups F3 + F4 CLOSED (commit 039020b). No open Phase 5 follow-ups.
Copilot wire contract: copilot.ask returns { runId, threadId } matching M31 complex_request — unchanged for M35.
Phase 5 badge is FROZEN at 'Phase 5' through v1.1.0 release. M35 T8 pins the literal string in a unit test. Phase 6 work is the next session after M35 T10.
